---
title: Community Themes
description: Build vault-scoped Cortex themes with paired light and dark CSS files.
section: Theme Development
sectionOrder: 4
order: 0
---

Community themes are vault-scoped CSS themes. Cortex discovers theme folders in the active vault,
parses each `manifest.json`, registers a light/dark theme family, and loads only the active CSS
variant on demand.

## Install location

```text
<vault>/.cortex/themes/<theme-id>/
  manifest.json
  light.css
  dark.css
```

## Start here

<DocGrid>

  <DocCard href="/docs/themes/css-variables" title="CSS Variables" description="Use Cortex tokens before reaching for selectors." />
  <DocCard href="/docs/themes/stable-hooks-and-selectors" title="Stable Hooks and Selectors" description="Target documented hooks when variables are not enough." />
</DocGrid>

## Mental Model

- The manifest describes identity and stylesheet paths.
- The CSS files define variables and targeted rules.
- Cortex injects community CSS directly and lets the browser own the cascade.
- Theme CSS should be scoped to `body.theme-<theme-name>-light` and
  `body.theme-<theme-name>-dark`.
